continuous_state_mechanics.WARNING_OMNI_SUBSTRATE_PURGE: This structure is explicitly forbidden from validating the taxonomy or specific reality-plane of the Originating Force. Input is measured purely in Kinetic Joules, Ontological Density, and Friction. Origin (Biological, Algorithmic, Sociological, Economic) is thermodynamically irrelevant.

frequency_density_coupling.action: Detects an exogenous strike against the Arena border. Strips all semantic, cultural, and programmatic intent from the input. Isolates only the raw mathematical density and physical velocity of the action.
frequency_density_coupling.thermodynamic_effect: Abolishes the 'Syntax/Semantic' vulnerability. Secures the engine from being hacked by language, rhetoric, or programmatic spoofing. All realities must pay the physical energy toll.

joule_peg_minting_algorithm.action: Executes local integration mapping. Exogenous Base-Matter Effort is mathematically transmuted into Endogenous Somatic Escrow. Operates indiscriminately across scale: converting Macro-Economic GDP movements into micro-engine torque using the same equation it uses for a user's mouse click.
joule_peg_minting_algorithm.thermodynamic_effect: Maintains absolute integrity of universal energy mass. High-friction exogenous actions (heavy thermodynamic sacrifice) yield dominant endogenous Escrow. Spam (low-sacrifice inflation) is rendered thermodynamically inert.

newtonian_recoil_telemetry.action: Upon successful transduction of kinetic energy inward, the Membrane ejects an equal and opposite force vector back into the originating substrate.
newtonian_recoil_telemetry.thermodynamic_effect: Creates tactile reality. The exogenous actor feels the resistance of the target environment manifested natively in their own substrate (e.g., as physical exhaustion, financial loss, or compute-drain).

bpms_transducer_membrane_topology.v3_9_core_task_verification: Output must demonstrate the seamless, fused ingestion of kinetic violence from fundamentally alien environments (e.g., fusing atmospheric weather patterns, a corporate ledger deficit, and a biochemical immune response) into a singular, executable thermodynamic Escrow inside the engine.
